allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{N='MB';E={[Math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet/1MB,1\)}}, CommandLine)
PowerShell(cd "d:\\Antigravity\\DSS_BPKAD\\backend"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "d:\\Antigravity\\DSS_BPKAD\\backend"; node server.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Receive-Job $job)
Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./utils/kritisGuard'\); console.log\('kritisGuard OK:', Object.keys\(g\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const os = require\('os'\); console.log\('Total RAM:', Math.round\(os.totalmem\(\)/1024/1024\), 'MB'\); console.log\('Free RAM:', Math.round\(os.freemem\(\)/1024/1024\), 'MB'\); console.log\('Used RAM:', Math.round\(\(os.totalmem\(\)-os.freemem\(\)\)/1024/1024\), 'MB'\);")
